headline: Insulet (PODD) Appoints Mike Panos as Chief Commercial Officer
summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) is one of the 8 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In. On March 30, 2026, Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) announced the appointment of Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, effective immediately.
